title: Deposit of security for jury costs
doc_html:
§451.3.  Deposit of security for jury costs

The court shall require any party, including the department, who demands a jury trial, to post a bond or other security as may be required in ordinary similar jury cases.  

Acts 1990, No. 133, §3.
